response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep experience in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems, but does not match this role's core requirements. Their C++ experience is limited to one early-career position (NI LabWindows/CVI components) and a university thesis project, far short of the 5–10 years of recent, hands-on C++ on Windows the role mandates. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure — the closest is a general investment-tech role in Germany focused on Node/GraphQL. Strong engineering fundamentals do not offset the absence of every mandatory pillar of this position.
strengths: Solid engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and performance-oriented low-latency work
Prior professional C/C++ experience on a Windows-based product (NI LabWindows/CVI)
Some financial-sector exposure via an investment-platform project in Germany
concerns: C++ experience is dated and brief — nowhere near the required 5–10 years of recent Windows C++ development
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge, and no Summit platform exposure

key_factors.factor: Missing fixed income / capital-markets domain expertise
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and CI/CD skills
